channel.title: GitHub Typst Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Typst in GitHub

item.title: touying-typ/touying
item.description: Touying is a powerful package for creating presentation slides in Typst.

item.title: Jollywatt/typst-fletcher
item.description: Typst package for drawing diagrams with arrows, built on top of CeTZ.

item.title: OrangeX4/Chinese-Resume-in-Typst
item.description: 使用 Typst 编写的中文简历, 语法简洁, 样式美观, 开箱即用, 可选是否显示照片
